end_date_error: End date must be later than start date

auth_panel.title: Unlock a wallet built for Lightning, Bitcoin and public identity
auth_panel.subtitle: Create your password, keep your backup safe, and start with a small test payment before using the wallet for more.
auth_panel.preview_caption: Pay, receive and watch node status in one workspace.
auth_panel.vault_description: Open your wallet without creating a hosted account.
auth_panel.rails_description: Lightning invoices, Lightning Addresses and on-chain requests share one flow.
auth_panel.identity_description: Claim a Lightning Address and add Nostr verification only when you want it public.

sign_up.title: Choose your wallet password
sign_up.description: Use a long passphrase you can keep safe. SwissKnife cannot reset it for you.
sign_up.password_helper: Use a long, unique passphrase for this server.
sign_up.backup_node: Back up the node and wallet before receiving meaningful funds.
sign_up.keep_private: SwissKnife cannot recover this password for you.
sign_up.fund_after_backup: Funding comes next: Lightning, on-chain or a reusable address.
sign_up.external_auth_title: Account creation is handled by your identity provider
sign_up.external_auth_description: This SwissKnife deployment uses external authentication, so wallet password setup is handled outside SwissKnife.
sign_up.external_auth_note: Use the configured sign-in provider. Dashboard access and roles come from the external identity system.
sign_up.agreement: By signing up, you agree to the

not_found.page_not_found_description: Sorry, we couldn’t find the page you’re looking for. Perhaps you’ve mistyped the URL? Be sure to check your spelling.

nostr_details.alert: Linking your Lightning Address ({{lnAddress}}) to your Nostr public key allow people to easily find you on Nostr. This also allows you to get verified and get a checkmark (NIP-05).

wallet_view.title: Wallet
wallet_view.send_money_detail: Paste an invoice, address, LNURL or Lightning Address.
wallet_view.receive_money_detail: Create a unified request, Lightning invoice, Bitcoin address or paycode.
wallet_view.receive_ready_detail: Reusable identity and one-off requests are available.
wallet_view.receive_setup_detail: Register an address or create a one-off payment request.
wallet_view.review_queue_detail: Failed payments and pending transfers across payment methods.
wallet_view.no_actions_detail: Failed payments and expired requests will appear here.
wallet_view.expired_requests_detail: Clean up old payment requests or generate fresh ones.
wallet_view.pending_outgoing_detail: These are still settling or waiting for the backend to update.
wallet_view.no_pending_activity: No active requests or pending payments.
wallet_view.pending_outgoing_notice: You have outgoing payments still pending.
wallet_view.unified_activity: Incoming and outgoing payments across payment methods.
wallet_view.fiat_unavailable: Fiat prices are unavailable, but wallet actions still work.
wallet_view.regtest_value_note: This environment is using zero-value development pricing. Regtest coins are useful for testing but have no market value.
wallet_view.no_fiat_value: No fiat value in this environment
wallet_view.identity_missing: Register a Lightning Address to make this wallet shareable

send_money.title: Send
send_money.recipient_placeholder: Paste an invoice, LNURL, Lightning Address, BIP21 URI or Bitcoin address
send_money.amount_locked: Amount comes from the payment request.
send_money.invalid_bip21_amount: The BIP21 amount is not a valid BTC amount. Ask for a corrected request before sending.
send_money.unsupported_required_parameters: This request requires unsupported BIP21 parameters: {{params}}. SwissKnife cannot safely send it.
send_money.invoice_expired_note: This Lightning invoice cannot be paid anymore. Paste a new invoice before sending.
send_money.invoice_fallback_expired_note: The Lightning fallback is expired. Review the on-chain destination before sending.
send_money.internal_transfer_description: This is a SwissKnife internal transfer. It settles instantly inside this instance.
send_money.unknown_input_note: Paste a supported payment request: Bolt11, LNURL, Lightning Address, BIP21, Bitcoin address or an internal SwissKnife address.
send_money.invalid_bitcoin_address: This looks like a Bitcoin address, but its checksum is invalid. Check the pasted address before sending.
send_money.recipient_note_helper: Sent only when the payment request supports comments.
send_money.internal_note_helper: Stored on both sides of this SwissKnife transfer.
send_money.note_not_sent: This payment request does not accept an extra note.
send_money.onchain_note_unavailable: On-chain labels are not sent today. Local payment labels need backend support.
send_money.fee_estimate_failed: The fee could not be estimated.
send_money.amount_and_fee_exceed_available: The amount plus the maximum fee exceeds the available balance.
send_money.onchain_estimate_disclaimer: This on-chain fee is a current estimate. SwissKnife recalculates it when you send.
send_money.bip21_with_lightning_note: BIP21 request: includes an on-chain address and a Lightning payment request. SwissKnife submits the full request so the backend can route the supported payment.
send_money.bip21_onchain_note: BIP21 request: on-chain destination and amount are kept together for review.
send_money.onchain_fee_note: On-chain payment: fees and confirmation time can change the decision.
send_money.fee_tier_placeholder: Fee tier selection is shown for review; the backend currently prepares the fee automatically.
send_money.lightning_fee_note: Lightning payment: instant settlement, low fees.
send_money.internal_fee_note: Internal payment: instant settlement, no network fee.
send_money.internal_detection_onchain: SwissKnife checks this address on submit. If it belongs to another wallet in this instance, the payment settles internally instead of broadcasting on-chain.
send_money.internal_detection_invoice: SwissKnife checks the invoice on submit. If it was created by another wallet in this instance, the payment settles internally instead of using the Lightning network.
send_money.no_fiat_value: No fiat value in this environment

receive_money.title: Receive
receive_money.request_format_helper: Any generates a unified BIP21 request when Lightning and on-chain are available.
receive_money.amount_helper: Enter amount in {{unit}}. Leave empty for a zero-amount request.
receive_money.empty_qr: Generate a request to show a QR
receive_money.address_unavailable: Could not fetch an on-chain address.
receive_money.unused_address_available: An unused address of this type is already ready. SwissKnife will reuse it instead of creating another address.
receive_money.address_reuse_note: This address remains the receive address until it is used.
receive_money.reuse_warning: This address has already received funds. Use a new unused address before sharing again.
receive_money.identity_note: Share this reusable Lightning Address when the payer should be able to pay you again without a new invoice.
receive_money.unified_note: This QR includes a Lightning invoice and an on-chain fallback address in one BIP21 request.
receive_money.unified_payload_description: One BIP21 request with Lightning and on-chain fallback.
receive_money.onchain_payload_description: On-chain receive request for the current address.
receive_money.identity_payload_description: Reusable LNURL-pay request backed by your Lightning Address.
receive_money.invoice_expires_description: Expires in {{time}} ({{date}}). Generate a new request after expiry.
receive_money.invoice_expired_description: This Lightning invoice cannot be paid anymore. Refresh the request before sharing it.

admin_wallet_picker.label: Wallet
admin_wallet_picker.helper: Choose the wallet that owns this admin transaction.
admin_wallet_picker.required: Select a wallet before creating an admin transaction.
admin_wallet_picker.fixed: This action is scoped to this wallet.
admin_wallet_picker.unavailable: Wallets are unavailable for this session.

bitcoin_address_type.taproot_helper: Best privacy and lower fees when sender support is modern.
bitcoin_address_type.native_segwit_helper: Most compatible modern address type. Use when Taproot support is uncertain.

activity_view.flow_subheader: Settled money movement over time, split by direction.
activity_view.empty_chart_description: Settle an invoice or payment to build the income and expenses chart.
activity_view.empty_description: Transactions will appear here after your first send or receive.

identity_view.title: Identity hub
identity_view.hero_subheader: Keep reusable identities separate from one-time payment requests. Share the human address, keep the current unused on-chain address until it receives funds, and connect Nostr only when you want public verification.
identity_view.claim_lightning_description: Choose the public username people and apps can use to send repeat Lightning payments to this wallet.
identity_view.lightning_body: A human-readable address for repeat Lightning payments.
identity_view.nostr_body: Optional NIP-05 verification for your public profile.
identity_view.onchain_body: Current unused Native SegWit or Taproot addresses for Bitcoin deposits.
identity_view.no_ln_address_description: Claim a username to receive Lightning payments with an email-like address and unlock Nostr verification.
identity_view.nostr_enabled: NIP-05 is enabled for this address.
identity_view.onchain_subheader: Use the current unused address until it receives funds; generate another only after it has been used.
identity_view.unused_address_available: An unused address of this type is already available.
identity_view.btc_addresses_unavailable: Bitcoin address list is unavailable. The backend may need read:btc_address for this account.

accounts_view.delete_description: Delete {{name}} and all of its wallets, API keys, and related data?
accounts_view.empty_description: Create an account to assign wallets and scoped API access.
accounts_view.hero_subheader: Review each account, its login identity, permissions, and asset wallets in one place.
accounts_view.oauth_permissions: OAuth2 permissions are managed by the identity provider and read from the access token.
accounts_view.search_placeholder: Search name, account ID, identity, or wallet ID
accounts_view.subject: Subject

wallets_view.empty_description: Create a wallet for an account and asset to make it available here.
wallets_view.hero_subheader: Inspect every account-owned balance by asset and network, then open a wallet for its payments, invoices, addresses, and contacts.
wallets_view.no_results_description: Adjust the search or identity status filter.

invoice_details.no_lightning_payload: No Lightning payload is available for this invoice.

payment_details.delivery_description: Payment lifecycle and recipient response details.
payment_details.lightning_settlement_description: The payment settled over Lightning. Fees are shown separately from the amount the recipient received.
payment_details.onchain_settlement_description: The payment is recorded as an on-chain transaction. Fees are shown separately from the amount sent.
payment_details.internal_settlement_description: The payment moved inside this SwissKnife instance. Fees are shown separately when present.

confirm_payment_dialog.write_message_placeholder: Write a message for the recipient

register_ln_address.title: Register New Lightning Address
register_ln_address.register_lightning_address_welcome: It looks like you haven't registered a Lightning Address yet. by doing so, people will be able to send you Bitcoin instantly, as easily as sending an email.
register_ln_address.missing_lightning_address_nostr: You first need to register a Lightning Address before you can link it to your Nostr account.

settings_view.subtitle: Manage the public identity people can pay and verify, plus the tokens that let apps use this wallet.
settings_view.identity_description: Manage Lightning Address, Nostr verification and on-chain receive identities in Identity Hub.
settings_view.identity_moved: Lightning Address and Nostr settings now live in Identity Hub.
settings_view.api_keys_description: Create and revoke personal wallet tokens from the Build area, alongside instance-wide API keys when your role allows it.
settings_view.jwt_instance_description: Local deployments use one owner password for this SwissKnife server.
settings_view.external_instance_description: External authentication controls dashboard users, roles and scopes.
settings_view.profile_description: Review the account and sign-in identity represented by your current session.
settings_view.account_id_description: Stable identifier for your SwissKnife account.
settings_view.sign_in_provider_description: Derived from the current identity token when the provider is recognizable.
settings_view.identity_subject_description: Identifier assigned by the configured authentication provider.
settings_view.effective_permissions_description: Permissions granted to this session by the current token.
settings_view.preferences_description: Choose how amounts and the dashboard theme are displayed across your signed-in devices.
settings_view.display_unit_description: Use BIP177-style bitcoin base-unit display or explicit sats labels across wallet amounts.
settings_view.hide_balances_description: Mask wallet and transaction amounts throughout the dashboard.
settings_view.theme_description: Switch between light, dark, or your system preference.
settings_view.receive_description: Set the defaults used when creating invoices and Bitcoin receive requests.
settings_view.default_address_type_description: Choose the address script type the receive drawer should start with.
settings_view.lightning_address_description: Manage your reusable Lightning Address and paycode from Identity Hub.
settings_view.security_description: Control the local unlock password for this dashboard login.
settings_view.password_change_notice: Changing the local owner password affects future sign-ins for this SwissKnife server.
settings_view.external_password_notice: Password changes are handled by the configured external identity provider.
settings_view.connections_description: Manage API access and inspect the SwissKnife instance connection.

settings_ln_address.alert: Changing your username will free it for any other user to claim. You will cease receiving payments from that address after the change.

settings_api_key.title: Personal access tokens
settings_api_key.description: Generate tokens with custom scopes to enhance the security of your API access. Tokens you have generated allow you to access the REST API. These tokens function like a combined name and password for API authentication.
settings_api_key.alert: Save your tokens and keep them secure, do not share them publicly or expose them in code repositories. Token scopes can no longer be edited. To make changes, please create a new token and delete the previous one.
settings_api_key.confirm_revoke: Are you sure you want to revoke this API token?

create_api_key_form.name: Token name
create_api_key_form.no_permissions: This API token can access account-wallet endpoints.
create_api_key_form.key_display_message: Save your token and keep it secure, do not share it publicly or expose it in code repositories. This token will never be displayed anymore.

api_key_list.name: Name
api_key_list.instance_description: Manage tokens that can operate across wallets and administrative API scopes.
